name: pi-sam
description: Kotlin/Ktor backend specialized coding agent built on pi-mono

scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc && chmod +x dist/cli.js && npm run copy-agents && npm run copy-skills
scripts.copy-skills: cd src/skills/bundled && for d in */; do mkdir -p ../../../dist/skills/bundled/$d && cp ${d}SKILL.md ../../../dist/skills/bundled/$d; done
scripts.sync-skills: rm -rf /tmp/superpowers-sync && git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/obra/superpowers.git /tmp/superpowers-sync && rm -rf src/skills/bundled && mkdir -p src/skills/bundled && for d in /tmp/superpowers-sync/skills/*/; do skill=$(basename $d) && mkdir -p src/skills/bundled/$skill && cp $d/SKILL.md src/skills/bundled/$skill/; done && rm -rf /tmp/superpowers-sync && echo "Synced $(ls src/skills/bundled | wc -l) skills"
